ddls:
CREATE TABLE "scholars" (
  "scholar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholar */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the scholar */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scholar */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the scholar */,
  "home_institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scholar's home institution */,
  "host_institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scholar's host institution */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scholar's discipline */,
  "program_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the scholar is participating in */,
  "academic_years" TEXT /* Academic years the scholar is participating in the program */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the scholar */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the scholar */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the scholar */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the scholar */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the scholar's photo */,
  "cv_url" TEXT /* URL of the scholar's curriculum vitae */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the scholar (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scholar's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scholar's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_home_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_program_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_country_id") REFERENCES program_countries ("program_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_host_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of the institution (e.g., University, Research Institute) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the institution is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the institution */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the institution's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "institution_size" TEXT /* Size of the institution (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "institution_type_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the institution type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the institution's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the institution's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "parent_discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent discipline */,
  "discipline_level" TEXT /* Level of the discipline (e.g., Undergraduate, Graduate) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discipline's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discipline's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., Scholar, Student) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "application_fees" TEXT /* Application fees for the program */,
  "funding_details" TEXT /* Funding details for the program */,
  "program_coordinator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program coordinator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_coordinator_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_coordinator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "scholar_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scholar submitting the application */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the application is for */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Submitted, Reviewed, Approved) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the application was reviewed */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the application was approved */,
  "application_essay" TEXT /* Application essay submitted by the scholar */,
  "recommendation_letters" TEXT /* Recommendation letters submitted with the application */,
  "transcripts" TEXT /* Transcripts submitted with the application */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview if applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_scholar_id FOREIGN KEY ("scholar_id") REFERENCES scholars ("scholar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_countries" (
  "program_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-country mapping */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "quota" INTEGER /* Number of scholars the program can accept from the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_countries_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_disciplines" (
  "program_discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-discipline mapping */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discipline */,
  "quota" INTEGER /* Number of scholars the program can accept for the discipline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_disciplines_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_disciplines_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Coordinator, Scholar) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, View, Edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
